stemHtml: What kind of activity is a part of an Aeronautical Meteorological Station`s (AMS) responsibilities?

options.a: Supplying information received concerning an accidental release of radioactive materials into the atmosphere within the area of responsibility.
options.b: Providing forecasts of global upper winds, upper-air temperatures, tropopause heights and temperatures.
options.c: Monitoring the development of tropical cyclones in the respective areas of responsibility, using geostationary and polar-orbiting satellite data and other meteorological information sources.
options.d: Performing the actual weather observation at aerodromes and offshore structures.
